testcase.name: test_get_privacy_settings

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing key: data_sharing assert 'data_sharing' in {'analytics_tracking': False, 'marketing_emails': True}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_bc_notary_gdpr.py:80: in test_get_privacy_settings assert key in settings, f"Missing key: {key}" E AssertionError: Missing key: data_sharing E assert 'data_sharing' in {'analytics_tracking': False, 'marketing_emails': True}
